items.name: The Victors Helmet - The Anomaly
items.description:
Never thought i'd see the day someone finally beat my challenges. 
Only the bravest of the brave can earn The Victors Helmet after completing The Anomaly.

Task: Complete 10 of the games quest in the event to claim your very own Victors Helmet UGC! You need to go in the game "Flex UGC Codes" to claim the ugc with the code "ICompletedTheAnomalyYippe"

Good luck, everyone is counting on you.
